response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including some Java exposure and IDE-related work at National Instruments, but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — his recent work is dominated by TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with minimal evidence of JVM ecosystem contributions.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse languages and systems
Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions
Strong communication and teaching background with workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal recent Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem work in resume
No clear evidence of IDE internals, JVM tooling, or application server integration experience
Primary tech focus shifted away from JVM to TypeScript/Node.js/DLang in last 5 years
